description_long: This is a vintage hardcover book with a blue-green front cover adorned with ornate black and gold decorative elements and Cyrillic script. The cover features intricate flourishes and two gold medallion-like designs at the top corners, with a central emblem above the main text. The book's spine and edges show signs of wear, with the blue color fading and the corners fraying. The back cover is plain and beige, with a faint rectangular stamp and some discoloration, indicating age and use. The book appears to be relatively thick, with a sturdy, boxy shape and a solid construction. The overall appearance suggests it is an antique or collectible item, possibly from the late 19th or early 20th century.
description: A vintage, thick hardcover book with a blue-green ornate front cover, gold accents, and a plain beige back. The book shows signs of age and wear, with decorative flourishes and Cyrillic script.
description_view_0: The front cover displays ornate black and gold designs, Cyrillic script, and decorative flourishes, with visible wear on the edges.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the blue spine and edge, with visible wear and no text or decoration.
description_view_2: The back cover is plain beige with a faint rectangular stamp and some discoloration, lacking any decorative elements.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the blue edge and spine with signs of wear and no visible text.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features ornate decorative flourishes and two gold medallion-like designs at the top corners, with a central emblem above the main text. The style is intricate and vintage, with a focus on ornamental patterns rather than pictorial imagery.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is blue and shows signs of wear, with no visible text or decorative elements. It appears plain and unadorned.
